tasks.subject: Task 0: Schema + sqlc + configx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add saml_sp.allow_idp_initiated column + SAMLConfig.MetadataValidity; regen sqlc; confirm PKCE columns + plain-exclusion.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/005_saml.sql","db/migrations/002_oidc.sql","db/queries/saml_sp.sql","pkg/db/saml_sp.sql.go","pkg/configx/configx.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go test ./pkg/db/... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["allow_idp_initiated column + AllowIdpInitiated field generate","SAMLConfig.MetadataValidity with viper default","PKCE columns exist + plain excluded by default/CHECK","build+db tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Re-auth gate helper (pkg/authn/reauth.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cross-protocol single-use re-auth gate: DemandReauth (mint nonce + stamp demand instant in KV, 10m TTL); ConsumeReauth (verify auth_time post-dates demand, single-use Del).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/authn/reauth.go","pkg/authn/reauth_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/authn/... -run TestReauth -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["DemandReauth mints nonce + SetEx marker","ConsumeReauth: stale auth_time->false, fresh->true, single-use, unknown nonce->false"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: OIDC prompt=login / max_age (authorize.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Honor prompt=login/prompt=none/max_age via the re-auth gate; prompt=login+none->invalid_request; demand+none->login_required; stale session cannot satisfy prompt=login.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run TestAuthorize -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["prompt set parsed; login+none->invalid_request","demand bounces with &reauth nonce; stale session re-bounces; fresh issues","max_age=0 always; large max_age no bounce; prompt=none+demand->login_required"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: OIDC PKCE policy + public-client introspection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** authorize consults require_pkce + allowed_code_challenge_methods (reject plain unless allowed); introspect rejects none-auth (public) clients with invalid_client (RFC 7662). Revocation unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/introspect.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/token.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run 'TestAuthorize|TestIntrospect' -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["non-allowed code_challenge_method->invalid_request; require_pkce enforced","public client introspect->invalid_client; confidential works; revoke still allows public own-token"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: SAML ForceAuthn re-auth (sso.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HandleSSO honors ForceAuthn via the re-auth gate; ForceAuthn+IsPassive->NoPassive (IsPassive wins); stale session cannot satisfy ForceAuthn.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/sso.go","pkg/protocol/saml/sso_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestSSO -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["ForceAuthn+session->login bounce w/ reauth; stale->re-bounce; fresh->issues","ForceAuthn+IsPassive->NoPassive Response"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: SAML NameIDPolicy/@Format honoring (sso.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Honor requested non-unspecified NameIDPolicy/@Format if producible; unspecified/absent->configured format; genuine mismatch->Responder/InvalidNameIDPolicy (no assertion). Thread NameIDFormat through authnReq.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/sso.go","pkg/protocol/saml/authnreq.go","pkg/protocol/saml/sso_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run 'TestSSO|TestAuthnReq' -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["mismatched Format->InvalidNameIDPolicy no assertion","persistent/unspecified/absent->normal assertion"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: SAML POST-binding AuthnRequest intake
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parseAuthnRequest dispatches on method; POST = base64 (no inflate) + enveloped sig via verifyElementSignature; re-add POST /saml/sso route + re-advertise POST SSO binding in metadata.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/authnreq.go","pkg/protocol/saml/sso.go","pkg/protocol/saml/metadata.go","pkg/server/server.go","pkg/protocol/saml/authnreq_test.go","pkg/protocol/saml/metadata_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run 'TestAuthnReq|TestMetadata' -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["POST signed AuthnRequest parses+verifies; unsigned to required-SP->ErrMissingSignature","metadata advertises both SSO bindings; POST route mounted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Signed IdP metadata + validity
tasks.description:
**Goal:** idpMetadata gives the EntityDescriptor an ID + validUntil/cacheDuration (from configx) + signs it (signElement, active key; fall back to unsigned if no active key so /saml/metadata never 500s).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/metadata.go","pkg/protocol/saml/metadata_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestMetadata -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["signed metadata verifies against active cert","validUntil in future + cacheDuration set; existing assertions still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: SAML IdP-initiated SSO
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /saml/sso/init?sp=&RelayState= emits unsolicited Response (empty inResponseTo) to default ACS, gated by per-SP allow_idp_initiated (default false). saml-sp create --allow-idp-initiated; route mounted.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/sso_init.go","pkg/protocol/saml/sso_init_test.go","pkg/protocol/saml/clientgen_saml.go","cmd/prohibitorum/main.go","pkg/server/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run 'TestSSOInit|TestSPGen' -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["opt-in true->unsolicited Response (no InResponseTo) to default ACS, RelayState echoed","opt-in false->403; no session->login 302; unknown sp->400","--allow-idp-initiated flag sets param"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: cmd/smoke v0.6 steps
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end smoke (steps 100+) for all v0.6 behaviors against live PG + dev server + mock SP; all v0.2-v0.6 green, SMOKE_EXIT=0.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/smoke/main.go","cmd/smoke/saml_mock.go"],"verifyCommand":"setsid bash /tmp/run_v06.sh; cat /tmp/v06.result","acceptanceCriteria":["prompt=login bounce-then-reauth; max_age; prompt=none->login_required","PKCE plain rejected; public introspect->invalid_client","ForceAuthn bounce; ForceAuthn+IsPassive->NoPassive; NameIDPolicy mismatch","POST AuthnRequest SSO; signed metadata verify; IdP-initiated opt-in accepted + non-opt-in 403","SMOKE_EXIT=0 all prior steps green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Docs (STATUS/AUDIT/INTEGRATION)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** v0.6 doc sections anchored to smoke steps; flip closed deferred AUDIT rows; INTEGRATION integrator guidance. Then post-implementation audit.

```json:metadata
{"files":["STATUS.md","AUDIT.md","INTEGRATION.md"],"verifyCommand":"git diff --stat STATUS.md AUDIT.md INTEGRATION.md","acceptanceCriteria":["STATUS v0.6 section w/ smoke-covered+untested","AUDIT closed rows flipped + guardrails recorded + accepted/deferred updated","INTEGRATION prompt/max_age/ForceAuthn + PKCE policy + public-introspect + idp-initiated launcher"]}
```
